g.title: **Internal Logic:** 1. Read opcode byte at `IP` (Instruction Pointer) 2. Lookup `opcode_metadata[opcode]` 3. Determine instruction size (e.g., 1 byte vs 3 bytes) 4. Fetch operands (Index/Address) 5. Resolve constant pool indices to symbolic values 6. Print row to terminal buffer

p.em: Note: High-level symbolic resolution happens here to assist debugging.

ul.li: Instruction: Mnemonic from VM Opcode Map.

div.p: 0x00: [0x10] LOAD_CONST 0x01: [0x00] arg_high 0x02: [0x00] arg_low 0x03: [0x10] LOAD_CONST 0x04: [0x00] arg_high 0x05: [0x01] arg_low 0x06: [0x20] ADD

g.title: **Internal Logic:** 1. Read opcode byte at `IP` (Instruction Pointer) 2. Lookup `opcode_metadata[opcode]` 3. Determine instruction size (e.g., 1 byte vs 3 bytes) 4. Fetch operands (Index/Address) 5. Resolve constant pool indices to symbolic values 6. Print row to terminal buffer
